authoritative_runs.purpose: Add xgboost to the alternative-model benchmark

result.summary: Useful benchmark, but LGBM + HistGB remained the best disciplined candidate.

authoritative_runs.purpose: Add catboost and compare pair/triple combos

result.summary: Several men combos improved raw Test Brier, but Val discipline still favored baseline_histgb_blend.

authoritative_runs.purpose: Men-only shortlist follow-up with calibration-aware comparison
Active gate check for the shortlisted men combo candidate

men.summary: The shortlisted combo candidate looked promising in local research but failed the real canonical gate.

women.summary: Women remains on the existing successful blend candidate; the men combo gate path was not a women improvement path.

next_focus.recommendation: Stop forcing combo-family follow-ups for now and move to a genuinely new men research axis.
